# BiblioKit AI Sitemap
> Priority URLs for designers, developers, and marketers using BiblioKit's Figma plugins.

## Core
- https://www.bibliokit.com/ - BiblioKit overview and waitlist.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/about - About BiblioKit and our mission.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/products - All BiblioKit plugins at a glance.

## Products
- https://www.bibliokit.com/figma-component-variant-renamer - AI batch renaming for variants and layers.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/figma-plugin-remove-prototype-links - Safe prototype link cleanup workflows.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/figma-design-system-audit-plugin - Design system audits and QA checks.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/figma-table-builder - Auto Layout table fixes and normalization.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/figma-component-states - Generate component states and specs.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/figma-organize-design-files-plugin - One-click file scaffolding and project setup.

## Resources
- https://www.bibliokit.com/resources - Playbooks and free tools.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/resources/remove-prototype-link - Prototype link cleanup ritual.

## Learn
- https://www.bibliokit.com/learn - Design Ops fundamentals hub.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/learn/design-ops-fundamentals - Evergreen Design Ops guide.

## Tutorials
- https://www.bibliokit.com/tutorials - Step-by-step Figma workflow tutorials.

## Blog
- https://www.bibliokit.com/blog - BiblioKit workflows and playbooks.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/blog/scaling-design-system-governance - Scaling design system governance.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/blog/what-is-design-ops-complete-guide - Complete guide to Design Ops.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/blog/complete-guide-design-systems-figma-2026 - Design systems in Figma 2026 guide.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/blog/design-dev-gap-2026 - 2026 design-dev shifts and fixes.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/blog/ultimate-figma-plugin-stack - Essential Figma plugin stack.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/blog/figma-workflow-automation-tools - Automation tools for faster shipping.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/blog/effortless-table-design-figma - Fast Figma table design guide.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/blog/effortless-table-design-auto-layout - Auto Layout table alignment playbook.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/blog/ui-component-states-guide - UI component states guide.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/blog/mastering-figma-auto-layout-wrap - Auto Layout Wrap setup steps.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/blog/fix-detached-instances-figma - Fix detached instances fast.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/blog/remove-prototype-links-in-figma - Remove stale prototype links.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/blog/mastering-design-system-guidelines - Design system governance guide.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/blog/install-uninstall-figma-plugin - Install and uninstall Figma plugins.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/blog/best-figma-plugins-organize-design-files-2026 - Best plugins for file organization 2026.

- https://www.bibliokit.com/use-cases/create-error-states-figma - Create error states.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/use-cases/create-empty-states-figma - Create empty states.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/use-cases/batch-export-figma-assets - Batch export assets.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/use-cases/create-icon-component-figma - Create icon components.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/use-cases/standardize-figma-page-naming - Standardize page naming.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/use-cases/create-responsive-table-figma - Create responsive tables.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/use-cases/clean-figma-file-before-export - Clean files before export.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/use-cases/clean-up-figma-layer-names - Clean up layer names.
- https://www.bibliokit.com/use-cases/check-design-system-coverage - Check design system coverage.
